description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named PyLops that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, fetch Git history and tags, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies and the package itself, and run tests with pytest.
